Buddhism Fundamental Buddhism i5 tradition of thought and prac: tice associated with Siddhartha; the original Buddha It aims at achieving deliverance from the cycle of birth and death and poS- sessing direct knowledge of the universe true nature Of the various Eastern   religions, Buddhism tne most strongly favored throughout the Inner Sphere; the Draconis Combine particular virtually endorses the Zen tradition_ contrast; Buddhist temples ad followers were targeted in the Federated Suns intamous Orienta Purge after House Kurita invaded the FedSuns during the First Succession War. Tne purge led to more deaths and disrupted more lives tnan any religious conflict since , Perhaps in response_ House Davion now encourages the growth of all religions new and old.
years ago_ they conquered Terra in brilliantly planned military campaign and they continuing t0 expand   tneir politica power base the Inner Sphere and Periphery:
RELIGIOUS TOLERANCE Generalizations are dangerous   thing; especially with regard religious tolerance within given Inner Sphere Periphery nation; However; certain generalities can be made about the practice and acceptance Of religion various realms The Federated Suns half of the Commonwealth is bizarre blend of religious freedoms and hypocrisy The state has never actively suppressed any relligion; but its people have risen UD on occasion t0 strike at perceived threat, as in the Oriental Purge. Though House Davion frequently encourages religious freedom for political purposes members of this Great House generally take religion more seriously than most. The Federated Suns was the birthplace 0f the Unfinished Book movement; which has made great strides in blurring the boundaries among disparate faiths The Lyran Alliance also promises religious freedom and has oiten promoted religious harmony: The Interfaitn Congress that produced the Unfinished Book movement was modeled after the Lyran Commonwealth Religious Council, founded in 2590_ The council analyzes incidents with religious overtones and edu: cates the masses about various religions large part of the counci' success comes from the average Lyran citizen' prac tical nature. which over the years has tended t0 downplay reli: gion importance_ Lyran may value religion _ but no more and in some cases Te55 -than solid   education and Cooa healtn: This attitude has nelped keep serious religious feuds t0 minumum. though sore maintain tnat this lack of fervent belief will claim its price the future (or the hereafter . The Draconis Combine replaced most organized religion early on with state endorsed philosophies meant (0 support Oriental culture and specifically House Kurita" rule. Much of the Dictum Honorium; detailed code of conduct for good Combine citizens_ be Iaid at the fect of Shiro Kurita; the nation' founder: dynamnic man Kho acted as his realm $ spintua as wcll as tem poral leader; ne swrept the people up in pro Combine euphoria that allowed him to bend ideology t0 his Own purposes_ Under the ess-rigid rule of Coordinator Theodore Kurita_ severa major reli- gions have established tentative footholds in the Combine shar- ing the Iringes with those exotic cults tnat have always been low-profile part of Combine society: The Free Worlds League harbors the greatest number of religious conflicts_ Different faiths frequently clash as do sects within taith and even variations 0t difterent sects This frac: tiousness mifrorc the relative lack of central authority that has plagued the League since its inception The League has essen: tially ~created over hundreds of star systems the same con: flicts common among old Terra nations Recurrent strife has limited tne growth of new religions and philosophies_ as well as hindered development for ward religious thinking such as gen- erally prevails the Lyran Alliance and Federated Suns; House Liao holds Up the Capellan Confederation as place true religious harmony:  though most claim that narmony
ALTERNATIVE RELIGIONS Many  sages, the most recent  being ComStar's founder Jerome Blake _ have claimed that anyone can define religion: takes two people to form a orthodox religion_ Add third and you llikely get heresy In other words there may be as many permutations of spiritual thought ad practice as there are peo existence The following paragraphs describe three of the best-known alternative faiths
The Unfinished Book Founded in the Federated Suns tthe Iate thirtietn centu- tne Unfinished Book   movement has capitalized that realm'$   prevailing religious tolerance Put   forward by Father Ovidon; tne first Chairman Elder the Suns Intertaith Congress; the Unfinished Book movement attempts collect the holy words and fundamental precepts Many religions single volume This religion nas swept every Successor State and Periphery nation. Among its followers are the dutiful members of hundred different falths well as those who claim no other religion than the Unfinished Book itself:
The One Star Faith 2801 , merchant Simon Kroeger the Lyran Commonwealth inadvertently founded new religion based on vision of Aleksandr Kerensky's Exodus fleet. He became reluctant prophet to those seeking the paradise Kerensky had supposedly discovered. When the Clans returned to the Inner Sphere , the One Star Faith suffered scnism_ small percent age. outraged that Kerensky's descendants had detiled tneir spiritual dream , joined the Lyran military to fight the Clans_ The remaining believers incorporated the Clans into their dogma and now welcome the chance bring them into the fold_
The Word of Blake radical  splinter @roup ComStar; tne Word of Blake holds fast to ComStar" historical tradition of mysticism. As tne Holy Order of ComStar did before its recent retorm_ the Word of Blake sees technology as sacred and regards the keeping of technological secrets spiritual obligation.
